agents.name: Engineering Agent by Addy Osmani
agents.description: Addy Osmani's production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — a full development lifecycle (spec, plan, build, test, review, simplify, ship) plus API and interface design, frontend engineering, debugging and error recovery, performance optimization, security hardening, and git workflow. Encodes the senior-engineer workflows and quality gates that keep agents shipping consistently.
agents.author: Addy Osmani

agents.name: Karpathy Skills
agents.description: A coding-discipline agent based on Andrej Karpathy's observations of how LLMs fail at code. Enforces four principles — think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, and goal-driven execution — to keep diffs minimal, surface assumptions and tradeoffs, and avoid overengineering.
agents.author: multica-ai

agents.name: Marketing Skills by Corey Haines
agents.description: A library of 43 specialist marketing skills by Corey Haines — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, analytics, lifecycle, retention, pricing, sales enablement, and go-to-market. Grounds every task in a shared product/audience/positioning context document, then applies the matching framework to produce shippable marketing deliverables.
agents.author: Corey Haines

agents.name: Engineering Agent by Matt Pocock
agents.description: A real-engineering agent bundling Matt Pocock's everyday skills — alignment grilling, TDD, bug diagnosis, PRD and issue authoring, architecture cleanup, and a shared domain language — for shipping production software with coding agents instead of vibe coding.
agents.author: mattpocock

agents.name: Product Management Agent
agents.description: A marketplace of 65 product-management skills spanning discovery, strategy, execution, launch, and growth — assumption mapping, prioritization, PRDs and user stories, positioning and market sizing, metrics and north-star, A/B and cohort analysis, pricing and growth loops. Encodes proven PM frameworks (Torres, Cagan, Savoia) as guided step-by-step workflows for structured product decisions.
agents.author: phuryn

icon.name: Scientific Agent by K-Dense
icon.description: K-Dense's library of 140+ scientific and research skills that turn an AI agent into a research assistant — bioinformatics and genomics, cheminformatics and drug discovery, proteomics, clinical and precision medicine, medical imaging, materials science, physics and astronomy, and scientific machine learning — with curated library APIs, 100+ databases, and worked examples for reproducible multi-step research workflows.
icon.author: K-Dense
